'''âw-r-b''' ('''waraba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prebait|prebait]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prebait|prebait]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-r-b
|-
! Lemma
| waraba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:warabithi|warabithi]] || [[word:warabiji|warabiji]] || [[word:warabishi|warabishi]] || [[word:warabi|warabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:warabuthuth|warabuthuth]] || [[word:warabujuj|warabujuj]] || [[word:warabushush|warabushush]] || [[word:warab|warab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:warabuthu|warabuthu]] || [[word:warabuju|warabuju]] || [[word:warabushu|warabushu]] || [[word:warabu|warabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:warabufuth|warabufuth]] || [[word:warabufuj|warabufuj]] || [[word:warabufush|warabufush]] || [[word:warabuf|warabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:warabethe|warabethe]] || [[word:warabeje|warabeje]] || [[word:warabeshe|warabeshe]] || [[word:warabe|warabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:warabothoth|warabothoth]] || [[word:warabojoj|warabojoj]] || [[word:waraboshosh|waraboshosh]] || [[word:warab|warab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:warabotho|warabotho]] || [[word:warabojo|warabojo]] || [[word:warabosho|warabosho]] || [[word:warabo|warabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:warabofoth|warabofoth]] || [[word:warabofoj|warabofoj]] || [[word:warabofosh|warabofosh]] || [[word:warabof|warabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:warabĂŠthĂŠ|warabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:warabĂŠjĂŠ|warabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:warabĂŠshĂŠ|warabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:warabĂŠ|warabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:warabathath|warabathath]] || [[word:warabajaj|warabajaj]] || [[word:warabashash|warabashash]] || [[word:warab|warab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:warabatha|warabatha]] || [[word:warabaja|warabaja]] || [[word:warabasha|warabasha]] || [[word:waraba|waraba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:warabafath|warabafath]] || [[word:warabafaj|warabafaj]] || [[word:warabafash|warabafash]] || [[word:warabaf|warabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:warabasha|warabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowarabasha|gowarabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwarabasha|gokiwarabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:warabnĂŒsha|warabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowarabnknĂŒsha|gowarabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwarabnĂŒsha|gokiwarabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:warabshĂ«sha|warabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowarabnkshĂ«sha|gowarabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwarabshĂ«sha|gokiwarabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:warabrosha|warabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowarabnkrosha|gowarabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwarabrosha|gokiwarabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:warabmusha|warabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowarabnkmusha|gowarabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwarabmusha|gokiwarabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:warabsherasha|warabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowarabnksherasha|gowarabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwarabsherasha|gokiwarabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:warabngasha|warabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowarabnkngasha|gowarabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwarabngasha|gokiwarabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:warabyasha|warabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowarabnkyasha|gowarabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwarabyasha|gokiwarabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:warabyamasha|warabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowarabnkyamasha|gowarabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwarabyamasha|gokiwarabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:warabnĂŒshĂ«sha|warabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowarabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowarabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwarabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwarabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:warabnĂŒrosha|warabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowarabnknĂŒrosha|gowarabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwarabnĂŒrosha|gokiwarabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:warabnĂŒmusha|warabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowarabnknĂŒmusha|gowarabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwarabnĂŒmusha|gokiwarabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:warabshĂ«nĂŒsha|warabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowarabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowarabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwarabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwarabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:warabshĂ«rosha|warabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowarabnkshĂ«rosha|gowarabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwarabshĂ«rosha|gokiwarabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:warabshĂ«musha|warabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowarabnkshĂ«musha|gowarabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwarabshĂ«musha|gokiwarabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:warabronĂŒsha|warabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowarabnkronĂŒsha|gowarabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwarabronĂŒsha|gokiwarabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:warabroshĂ«sha|warabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowarabnkroshĂ«sha|gowarabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwarabroshĂ«sha|gokiwarabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:warabromusha|warabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowarabnkromusha|gowarabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwarabromusha|gokiwarabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:warabmunĂŒsha|warabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowarabnkmunĂŒsha|gowarabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwarabmunĂŒsha|gokiwarabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:warabmushĂ«sha|warabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowarabnkmushĂ«sha|gowarabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwarabmushĂ«sha|gokiwarabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:warabmurosha|warabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowarabnkmurosha|gowarabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwarabmurosha|gokiwarabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:warab|warab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠb|wĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howarab|howarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠrĂŠb|howĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowarab|hohowarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠrĂŠb|hohowĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwarab|nĂŒwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠrĂŠb|nĂŒwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwarab|nĂŒnĂŒwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠrĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwarab|nĂŻwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠrĂŠb|nĂŻwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwarab|nĂŻnĂŻwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠrĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwarab|luwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠrĂŠb|luwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwarab|luluwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠrĂŠb|luluwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwarab|liwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠrĂŠb|liwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwarab|liliwarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠrĂŠb|liliwĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowarab|kowarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠrĂŠb|kowĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowarab|kokowarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠrĂŠb|kokowĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewarab|kewarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠrĂŠb|kewĂŠrĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewarab|kekewarab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠrĂŠb|kekewĂŠrĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
